description_long: This is a single-propeller, military-style airplane with a streamlined fuselage and a low-mounted, straight wing configuration. The aircraft is painted in a matte gray color with red star insignias on the wings and fuselage, suggesting Soviet or Russian origin. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and is positioned just ahead of the wing root, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail section features a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a classic tail design. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the landing gear is not visible, possibly indicating a retractable configuration. The overall design is reminiscent of World War II-era fighter planes, with smooth, aerodynamic surfaces and minimal external protrusions.
description: A matte gray, single-propeller military airplane with red star insignias, low-mounted straight wings, and an enclosed cockpit. The design is streamlined and reminiscent of a WWII-era fighter.
description_view_0: The airplane is seen from a rear-side angle, highlighting the left wing, tail, and the red star insignias on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the propeller, nose, and the full wingspan, with the cockpit canopy visible behind the propeller.
description_view_2: The airplane is viewed from a rear-side angle opposite to view 0, showing the right wing, tail, and the red star insignias on the wing and fuselage.
description_view_3: A direct rear view displays the tail section, both horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan, with the cockpit canopy visible at the front of the tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Landing gear not visible; likely retractable taildragger configuration based on design.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
